title: A Will To Be Working.
content:
Although we cannot turn the fervent fit
    Of sin, we must strive 'gainst the stream of it;
    And howsoe'er we have the conquest miss'd,
    'Tis for our glory that we did resist.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Will To Be Working."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
